Media, USB, Audio, and In-Car Connections

Troubleshoot HEIF, HDR, video size, USB-C display output, external microphones, OTG, CarPlay, Android Auto, and Bluetooth audio.

Browse guidesAll smartphone guides
Separate the terminology

Check protocol, setting, and plan requirements independently.

Record original values

Save settings and errors so changes can be reversed.

Retest one variable

Keep test conditions constant to preserve causality.

Detailed guides

10 guides

Media, USB, Audio, and In-Car Connections

HEIC or HEIF Photos Will Not Open or Share

When phone photos will not open on another computer or app, check HEIF support, conversion, automatic sharing compatibility, and quality preservation.

Reviewed: 2026-07-23Read guide →
Media, USB, Audio, and In-Car Connections

Why HDR Photos Change Color on Other Devices or Social Apps

Explain washed-out, dark, or oversaturated HDR photos by checking HDR display support, color space, tone mapping, and social-platform conversion.

Reviewed: 2026-07-23Read guide →
Media, USB, Audio, and In-Car Connections

Phone Video Is Too Large to Send

Send large 4K or HDR phone videos by comparing resolution, frame rate, codec, trimming, compression, and cloud-link sharing.

Reviewed: 2026-07-23Read guide →
Media, USB, Audio, and In-Car Connections

Phone USB-C Video Output Is Not Working

When USB-C will not output video, verify DisplayPort Alt Mode, device support, cable capability, hub power, and desktop-mode requirements.

Reviewed: 2026-07-23Read guide →
Media, USB, Audio, and In-Car Connections

Phone Does Not Recognize an External Microphone

Fix USB-C, Lightning, or 3.5 mm microphones that fall back to the built-in mic by checking TRRS standard, power, adapters, and app input selection.

Reviewed: 2026-07-23Read guide →
Media, USB, Audio, and In-Car Connections

Android USB OTG Storage Is Not Mounting

When Android does not mount a USB drive or card reader, check OTG support, power, file system, USB mode, and encryption.

Reviewed: 2026-07-23Read guide →
Media, USB, Audio, and In-Car Connections

Quick Share or Nearby Sharing Cannot Find the Other Device

Fix nearby transfer discovery or stalled transfers by checking visibility, account matching, Bluetooth and Wi-Fi, screen lock, and file limits.

Reviewed: 2026-07-23Read guide →
Media, USB, Audio, and In-Car Connections

Apple CarPlay Keeps Disconnecting

Fix wired or wireless CarPlay disconnects by checking the cable, vehicle USB port, Wi-Fi and Bluetooth, VPN, and head-unit firmware.

Reviewed: 2026-07-23Read guide →
Media, USB, Audio, and In-Car Connections

Android Auto Keeps Disconnecting or Will Not Start

Fix Android Auto that disconnects or will not launch by checking USB quality, wireless requirements, permissions, battery controls, and head-unit compatibility.

Reviewed: 2026-07-23Read guide →
Media, USB, Audio, and In-Car Connections

Bluetooth Audio Stutters or Has High Latency

Fix Bluetooth audio stutter or latency by checking distance, 2.4 GHz interference, multipoint, codec negotiation, battery, and developer overrides.

Reviewed: 2026-07-23Read guide →
